description_long: This kiosk is a tall, rectangular structure with a white, brick-like exterior and a single door on one side. The upper section features large, colorful printed advertisements with images of people, bordered by yellow and blue geometric lines. The door is vertically oriented and appears to be made of the same white material as the rest of the kiosk, with a subtle logo or graphic on its surface. The kiosk stands on a flat, dark base, suggesting it is intended for placement on sidewalks or plazas. There are no visible windows, and the roof is flat and unadorned. The overall design is modern and functional, with a focus on advertising and controlled access.
description: A tall, white, brick-textured kiosk with a single door and large, colorful printed advertisements on its upper section. The design is modern, with a flat roof and no visible windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open door, logo on the door, and the main advertising panels above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the continuous brick texture and the full advertising panels, with the door not visible.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the uninterrupted brick surface and the upper advertising panels.
description_view_3: Side-rear view with the door open, revealing a glimpse of the interior and the advertising panels above.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign with photographic images and geometric borders, placed on the upper panels above the door and on adjacent sides; includes a logo on the door.
attribute_door_configuration: One single hinged door located on the front face.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof, no visible overhangs or decorative elements, appears to be made of the same material as the walls.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern minimalist with commercial advertising elements.
